name: Ice Cream

pros.title: high enjoyment factor
pros.explanation: A real-world reason people eat it, even if the category fit is weak.

pros.title: still retains some calcium
pros.explanation: Not nutritionally empty, just weak compared with stronger dairy foods.

pros.title: still clearly dairy-based
pros.explanation: That matters for fairness when picking anchors.

cons.title: sugar load is a major dairy-category problem
cons.explanation: This pushes it away from what strong dairy foods are supposed to deliver.

cons.title: saturated fat is a major drawback
cons.explanation: A second major strike against the food in this category.

cons.title: protein usefulness is weak for dairy
cons.explanation: That makes it a poor fit compared with stronger dairy anchors like yogurt.

sourceNotes: Values are approximate representative placeholders for ruleset tuning, not a clinical nutrient database.
